cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure this out. The question is about what the author thinks regarding high school teachers. The options are A, B, C, D. First, I need to look at the part of the letter where the author talks about teachers. The relevant section is the third paragraph. Let me read that again. The author says: "My final issue I would like to call to your attention is teacher's salaries. The high school students of today are America's future. In a way, America's future depends greatly on the high school teachers of America. Saying this, it is sad that teacher's salaries are where they are. While teachers are working harder and harder every day to teach high school students, CEO's of big companies that are driving our countries economy into the ground are getting bonuses.
